notes: Touch 7 runs_platform czone_2_0; platform_version_unconfirmed + config_unsourced until version photo/.zcf. Climate gate: vessel has 230V aircon (folio 10) but CZone-supported HVAC integration unknown — AC-present ≠ CZone-supported-HVAC.
fixture_auth: Fixture-Auth: chat instance-policy + VESSEL_ARTIFACT batch — outremer_post_batch_b primary with distinct Combi/MLI/Alpha instances; Fixture-Auth: chat Solar v3 — vessel_facts observation/inference + evidence refs; Fixture-Auth: chat Solar v4 — vessel_display_name=Supernova; Fixture-Auth: chat channel_map founding — Ind C adjudicated channel_map + COI located instances; Fixture-Auth: chat owner OPT corroboration — Zeus SR 12 x2, Halo 20+, freezer/wifi/electronic/windlass/winches; Fixture-Auth: chat Zeus SR promote — scratch bg_zeus_sr validated (0 flags, material instability 0) into outremer + post_batch_b profiles; Fixture-Auth: chat CZone ui_pages reextract — Favourites/Alarms/Control/Monitoring actions from QSG V1.1 targeted map

installation_notes.note: 230V air conditioning present (aft cabin aircon + AC pump) but whether HVAC is CZone-integrated 'supported HVAC' is unknown — Climate page stays unresolved (AC-present ≠ CZone-supported-HVAC).
Owner-confirmed fitted CZone OPT circuits: freezer; wifi; electronic; windlass control; electric winch port and starboard. See inventory for Zeus SR 12 chartplotters x2 and B&G Halo 20+ radar.

vessel_facts.text: Davit-mounted array: 3× rigid panels feeding the davit array controller (SmartSolar MPPT 150/60).
Coachroof array: 6× semi-flex panels; boom geometry can cast shade across that array (visible in deck photo).
Array survey estimate: davit ~1.0–1.2 kW primary; coachroof ~600 W.
Expect lower coachroof contribution when the boom shades those panels.

vessel_facts.document_citation: Owners' manual 55N60 p46 C-ZONE CHANELS Ind C 05/05/2026
vessel_facts.text: Three Combination Output Interfaces located from the Ind C channel map: COI n°1 Carré/salon (1000 0001), COI n°2 Bâbord/port (1000 0010), COI n°3 Tribord/starboard (1000 0011).
